      • Extends

        public Extends(TypeReference supertype)

      • Extends

        public Extends(ExtList children)
        Constructor for the transformation of COMPOST ASTs to KeY.
        Parameters:
        children - the children of this AST element as KeY classes. May include: several TypeReference (as references to the supertypes) a Comment

    • Method Detail

      • visit

        public void visit(Visitor v)
        calls the corresponding method of a visitor in order to perform some action/transformation on this element
        Parameters:
